message:
fix: address 4 doctor bugs — panics, masked errors, missing rows.Err()

- bd-k8pu: guard ParseVersionParts index access for single-component versions
- bd-qa7l: CheckIDFormat false branch now reports sequential IDs (was dead code)
- bd-a97g: query failures return StatusWarning instead of StatusOK (4 locations)
- bd-nk9f: add rows.Err() checks after all for-rows.Next() loops (~20 locations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
